body_transformation: Pikachu's rounded head retains its shape but now bears molten gold fur with faint amber glows along the ear edges, while the dark brown cheek patches transform into cracked magma armor plating with glowing crimson fissures. The pale cream underbelly shifts to a smoky charcoal texture with ember-scaled patterns, and the curled tail tip now extends into a flame-tipped structure with molten gold strands weaving through its length. The entire body appears to shimmer with heat-haze distortion, yet maintains the original quadruped stance and low crawling posture. Small smoke trails curl from joint areas, adding dynamic motion without altering structural form.
signature_feature: Tail tip: molten gold flame with ember-scaled tendrils and glowing crimson core.
